source: A0 merge of lane network summary artifacts
browserToolPolicy: mcp__chrome_devtools_isolated__ for browser-visible validation after restart note

laneSummaries.summary: Shell navigation and Overview valid action used bounded local requests and no uncontrolled request loop.
Config save/reset/schema calls captured; invalid source and callback-port requests intentionally produced validation errors.
Login-start, failed-flow, logout, and status calls captured with flow/state values redacted.
Audit and Playground validation requests captured; schema/write/search failures classify command contract defects.
Research and Source Table requests captured; live table data requests are blocked by missing Lark auth/source.
UI visual-state network summary captured, including expected recoverable config error probe.
A7 important requests returned 200 and response redaction checks passed for visible/API details.
A8 notable requests include expected injected 500s for config/audit/playground/research and 200 partial table responses.

expectedErrorResponses: GET /api/audit/<id> 500 after A8 removed file-backed audit fixture
GET /api/research/<id> 500 after A8 removed file-backed research fixture
blockedLiveDependencies: Live Lark test app and app secret
Live Lark test Bitable source URL
